requirements.title: Roundtrip
requirements.statement: Exchange design and implementation evidence through GitHub.
acceptanceCriteria: A completed design event can be imported by exact revision.

validation: Reject modified or deleted completed event paths.

workflows.title: Design to implementation
steps: Web Pro publishes a completed design event.
Codex imports the exact design revision.
workflows.expectedOutcome: Codex implements the design revision bound to the flow.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: No force push
validation: Inspect transport arguments and non-fast-forward recovery tests.

decisions.rationale: It separates code changes from exchange artifacts.

sprints.objective: Implement the minimum complete GitHub roundtrip.
verification: Run focused contract and transport tests.
cumulativeIntegrationChecks: Exercise flow creation through design import.
